untranslatable_reason: The signal requires comparing the oscillator (close - sma_10 - sma_50) to its previous bar value (osc > osc[1]), which requires custom oscillator calculation and bar-by-bar comparison. The ALLOWED_INDICATORS list does not include a pre-calculated oscillator or support for custom composite indicators. The signal's 'buy to cover next open' condition is also semantically ambiguous in a standard long/short framework.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using close vs sma_50 as a proxy for oscillator direction, but this loses the nuanced fast/slow MA differential logic. The original oscillator (10-period MA minus 50-period MA) should be implemented as a custom indicator in the backtest engine before this rule can be properly applied.
